description: Enterprise memory governance for AI assistants — governed lifecycle: Capture → Evaluate → Store → Retrieve → Rank → Compose → Update → Forget → Audit, wrapped by Security, Governance, Observability, Reliability, Evaluation planes.

key_directories.services/api: FastAPI backend (gateway, extractor, policy broker, write/read path, audit, workers, loops)
key_directories.services/api/app/workers: Background lifecycle workers (decay, archive, conflict_scan, reflection, deletion_compaction, deletion_verification, retention)
key_directories.services/api/app/loops: Loop engineering definitions (memory.write, memory.read, memory.governance, memory.evaluation, release.gate, learning.continuous)
key_directories.services/api/app/db: Repository abstraction (memory + postgres backends), RLS enforcement, governance metadata
key_directories.services/api/app/llm: Provider-neutral LLM layer (stub, openai, anthropic, gemini) with structured output & heuristic fallback
key_directories.apps/web: Next.js frontend (chat, memories, governance, audit, loops, admin, architecture)
key_directories.infra/db/migrations: Postgres + pgvector schema, RLS policies (migration 004 FORCE)
key_directories.docs: Architecture, governance, deployment, loops, retention, compression, etc.

invariants.name: Tenant Isolation
invariants.description: Every memory query filters by tenant_id + user_id. Enforced via repository tenant-scoped queries + Postgres RLS (migration 004 FORCE).

invariants.name: Deletion Guarantee
invariants.description: status='deleted' rows are never retrieved. Repository filters status != deleted. Verified by deletion_verification worker.

invariants.name: Provenance
invariants.description: Every stored memory has non-null source (kind, excerpt, message_id, conversation_id). Write service always sets it.

invariants.name: Graceful Degradation
invariants.description: Retrieval failures never block response generation. Gateway wraps retrieval in safe_call with default empty context.

invariants.name: Policy Before Storage
invariants.description: Policy broker runs before any write. LLM extraction is advisory only; broker stays authoritative.

invariants.name: Temporary Chat
invariants.description: temporary_chat=true short-circuits both read and write paths. No memory access, no audit writes.

invariants.name: Auditability
invariants.description: Every lifecycle action appends an audit event via AuditService. Audit logs are append-only.

invariants.name: Explainability (Memory Usage Trace)
invariants.description: Every chat response carries trace.memories_used + trace.memories_blocked with admission_decision, admission_reason, and governance fields (legal_hold, pinned, protected, retention_policy, retention_expires_at).

invariants.name: Typed Memory
invariants.description: Episodic, semantic, procedural, project, knowledge, system, constraint, preference, workflow memories differ in semantics and lifecycle.

invariants.name: Evaluation
invariants.description: Memory quality testable through golden set + adversarial cases, not just manual inspection.

invariants.name: Worker Runtime Operability
invariants.description: Background jobs run off chat path, are tenant-scoped, idempotent, retry-safe, leased (no duplicate runs), dead-lettered on exhausted retries, persisted run history (worker_runs table, migration 006), health at GET /healthz/workers.

entry_points.worker_runner: cd services/api && python -m app.workers.runner --tenant t1 --user u1 --job all
